landing.tagline: One tap tells your friends you're open to a spontaneous visit.
landing.subtagline: No plans. No group chats. Just "swing by."
landing.step1Desc: Pick a vibe and tap open. Your door's open for 30 minutes.
landing.step2Desc: Send it to whoever might want to swing by.
landing.step3Desc: No planning, no back and forth. Just a visit.

auth.verifyEmailSent: Check your email to verify your account before logging in.
auth.verificationResent: Verification email resent. Check your inbox.
auth.couldNotResend: Could not resend. Please try again.
auth.emailVerified: Email verified! You can now log in.
auth.verificationInvalid: Verification link is invalid or expired.
auth.linkExpiredDesc: This verification link has already been used or has expired.
auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.resetLinkSent: Check your email. If that address is registered, a reset link is on its way.
auth.resetLinkExpired: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

home.openDoorDesc: Visible to your selected friends. Closes after 30 minutes, or whenever you decide.
home.inviteFriendsText: Invite friends — they'll see when your door is open.
home.nudgeConfirmed: Reminder set! You can change it in your
home.yourDoorIsOpen: Your door is open — tap to return
home.feedbackTipText: Enjoying dropby? Your feedback shapes what we build next.
home.feedbackTipDismissed: You can always share feedback from your
home.coffeeTipText: Someone dropped by. If dropby brought you a real moment, consider buying us a coffee ☕
home.doorOpenCopyText: I opened my door for you on dropby

friends.title: Friends
friends.noFriendsDesc: Invite people or add them by email.
friends.removeMessage: Remove {{name}} as a friend? This cannot be undone.

invite.ownLinkDesc: Share it with friends to let them join dropby.
invite.friendsNowDesc: You and {{name}} are now friends on dropby.
invite.signUpToJoin: Sign up / Log in to fully join dropby
invite.sendMeAppLink: Send me a link to the app
invite.weNotifiedThem: We sent {{name}} a notification that you're on your way.

feedback.title: Share feedback
feedback.thanksDesc: Your feedback goes straight to the people building dropby. It matters.
feedback.thoughtPlaceholder: Is dropby helping you make plans with people? What's working, what isn't?
feedback.bugPlaceholder: What happened? What were you trying to do?
feedback.wantsReply: You can reach me for follow-up

profile.title: Profile
profile.remindersDesc: We'll send you a notification to open your door.
profile.autoNudgeTitle: Remind me when I opened my door this time last week
profile.deleteMessage: This will permanently delete your account, friends, and all data. This cannot be undone.
